name: Pork Chops from Hell
recipeIngredient: LEIGH ANN'S "I CRAVE JERK, BUT WHAT'S IN THE FRIDGE" PORK CHOPS FROM
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large deep skillet.
2. Sauté 1 large chopped onion until translucent.
3. Sprinkle over the onions ground habanero (adjust amount for desired heat).
4. Drizzle honey (about 1/4 cup).
5. Add prepared mustard and mango chutney (2 tablespoons each).
6. Mix all ingredients together.
7. Place raw pork chops on top of the mixture.
8. Turn the chops over to coat them evenly.
9. Pour water into the skillet, then immediately cover with a lid to prevent aromatics from sublimating away.
10. Stir occasionally and turn the chops over.
11. Cook over medium-high heat until the sauce caramelizes naturally.
12. Serve hot with rice.
Made this last night on the spur of the moment; all who tried it said I must remember to make it again. This is part of the remembering process.
